# Reaper DAW — dense custom-theme UI

**Clawmachine-fit rating:** A

**Notes:** Reaper's TCP + dense toolbar shows how far pro-tool density can push without becoming illegible. Good reference for operator-panel density.

**Credits / sources:** Cockos (cockos.com / reaper.fm), Unison Audio, Sound On Sound.

**Use:** internal non-commercial fair-use design reference only. Do not redistribute.
